Do not propose fixes, post suggestions, comments or review the code for;
  1. Test files in tests folder and bugs/problems related to them
  2. Script files in scripts folder and bugs/problems related to them
  3. Document files, their markdown syntax problems and other documentary file syntax issues
  4. Source file's non-breaking, non-functional cosmetic or syntactic problems. Only propose fixes for code/project breking stuff
  5. Non-source code related supplementary or auxillary files that don't directly contribute project's purposes

You will only post comments for source code's functional, non-cosmetic, code-breaking bugs or possible bug potentials that may be caused by.
